details.test: Task 1: Add in-person Machine Learning seminar after 2 PM to My Schedule
Task 2: Create morning Data Science My Day entry without conflicts
Task 3: Register for an afternoon seminar with at least 5 seats remaining
Task 4: Bookmark later/shorter seminar from a speaker profile and verify in My Bookmarks
Task 5: Add earliest free seminar in a month to Watchlist
Task 6: Schedule beginner seminar under 90 minutes before noon
Task 7: Favorite soonest certificate/long seminar (with graceful fallback)
Task 8: Build accessibility-friendly list with two Q&A seminars
Task 9: Create multi-day track with seminars across two dates
